1.name: Starter Pathfinder
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the first shift as a Runner.
1.title: Starter Pathfinder Title

2.name: Expert Pathfinder
2.unlock_conditions: Complete the Front Line Open & Front Line Close Learning Paths. Must be able to work with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Pathfinder Title

3.name: Elite Pathfinder
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently.
3.title: Elite Pathfinder Title

1.name: Starter Guest Ambassador
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Guest Attendant Learning Path. Complete the first shift as Guest Attendant.
1.title: Starter Guest Ambassador Title

2.name: Expert Guest Ambassador
2.unlock_conditions: Complete the Dining Room Open & Dining Room Close Learning Paths. Must be able to work with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Guest Ambassador Title

3.name: Elite Guest Ambassador
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently.
3.title: Elite Guest Ambassador Title

1.name: Starter Lane Master
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Drive Thru Learning Path. Complete your first shift in Drive Thru.
1.title: Starter Lane Master Title

2.name: Expert Lane Master
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Lane Master Title

3.name: Elite Lane Master
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently, handling order taking and cashing out alone if needed.
3.title: Elite Lane Master Title

1.name: Starter Money Maker
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Cashier Learning Path. Complete the first shift as Cashier.
1.title: Starter Money Maker Title

2.name: Expert Money Maker
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision, requires full knowledge of the menu and different modification options.
2.title: Expert Money Maker Title

3.name: Elite Money Maker
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently.
3.title: Elite Money Maker Title

1.name: Starter Bun Builder
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the ButterBurgers and Sandwiches Learning Path and complete the first shift on Buns.
1.title: Starter Bun Builder Title

2.name: Expert Bun Builder
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision and requires full knowledge of silent signals.
2.title: Expert Bun Builder Title

3.name: Elite Bun Builder
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently, usually involving both screens.
3.title: Elite Bun Builder Title

1.name: Starter Grill Master
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Grill Master Learning Path and complete the first shift on Grill.
1.title: Starter Grill Master Title

2.name: Expert Grill Master
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision and requires full knowledge of silent signals and grill techniques.
2.title: Expert Grill Master Title

3.name: Elite Grill Master
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently, usually involving pressing and off-loading alone.
3.title: Elite Grill Master Title

1.name: Starter Crisp Captain
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Fry Specialist Learning Path and complete the first shift on Fryer.
1.title: Starter Crisp Captain Title

2.name: Expert Crisp Captain
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision and requires knowledge on how to work all 4 fryer vats (fries, sides, chicken, and fish).
2.title: Expert Crisp Captain Title

3.name: Elite Crisp Captain
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently, usually handling all 4 vats alone.
3.title: Elite Crisp Captain Title

2.name: Expert Meal Master
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Meal Master Title

3.name: Elite Meal Master
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently.
3.title: Elite Meal Master Title

2.name: Expert Mastermind
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Mastermind Title

3.name: Elite Mastermind
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently.
3.title: Elite Mastermind Title

2.name: Expert Handyman
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Handyman Title

3.name: Elite Handyman
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work unsupervised.
3.title: Elite Handyman Title

1.name: Starter Stocksmith
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Food Preparation Learning Path.
1.title: Starter Stocksmith Title

2.name: Expert Stocksmith
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision.
2.title: Expert Stocksmith Title

3.name: Elite Stocksmith
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised.
3.title: Elite Stocksmith Title

1.name: Starter Scoop Star
1.unlock_conditions: Complete the Dessert Specialist & Custard Production Learning Paths and complete the first shift on Custard
1.title: Starter Scoop Star Title

2.name: Expert Scoop Star
2.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station with very little supervision. Scooping, topping, and mixing is expected at this point
2.title: Expert Scoop Star Title

3.name: Elite Scoop Star
3.unlock_conditions: Must be able to work the station unsupervised and able to handle peak hours proficiently. Requires dexterity handling the shake and custard machine.
3.title: Elite Scoop Star Title

six_months.name: Rising Team Member
six_months.unlock_conditions: Be part of the team for a period of 6 months.
six_months.title: Rising Team Member Title

one_year.name: Dedicated Team Member
one_year.unlock_conditions: Be part of the team for a period of 1 year.
one_year.title: Dedicated Team Member Title

three_years.name: Seasoned Team Member
three_years.unlock_conditions: Be part of the team for a period of 3 years.
three_years.title: Seasoned Team Member Title

five_years.name: Veteran Team Member
five_years.unlock_conditions: Be part of the team for a period of 5 years.
five_years.title: Veteran Team Member Title

ten_years.name: Legacy Team Member
ten_years.unlock_conditions: Be part of the team for a period of 10 years.
ten_years.title: Legacy Team Member Title

xmas.name: Santa’s Helper
xmas.unlock_conditions: Work a full shift on Christmas Eve.
xmas.title: Santa’s Helper Title

trainer.name: Mentor
trainer.unlock_conditions: Be promoted to a Crew Chief.
trainer.title: Mentor Title

jack_of_all_trades.name: Jack Of All Trades
jack_of_all_trades.unlock_conditions: Complete the FOH, BOH, and Desserts training.
jack_of_all_trades.title: Jack Of All Trades Title

surveys.name: Guest Favorite
surveys.unlock_conditions: Get 15 or more surveys in a month.
surveys.title: Guest Favorite Title

staying_extra.name: Team Player
staying_extra.unlock_conditions: Stay one hour or more after the end of your scheduled shift (must be PIC-approved).
staying_extra.title: Team Player Title
